data.title: US government taps Pyth, Chainlink among blockchains to process economic data on-chain
data.description:
The U. S. Department of Commerce has announced partnerships with blockchain oracle providers Chainlink and Pyth Network to publish official macroeconomic data on-chain, marking a significant milestone in integrating blockchain technology with government data infrastructure. The initiative aims to enhance the transparency and accessibility of economic data by leveraging decentralized networks
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-pyth-chainlink-to-process-economic-data/

data.title: US Government Partners with Chainlink to Distribute Government Data Onchain
data.description:
The United States government has entered into a partnership with Chainlink, a prominent blockchain technology provider, to facilitate the distribution of government data on blockchain networks. This collaboration aims to enhance transparency, improve data accessibility, and ensure secure and efficient sharing of critical information with the public and various stakeholders through on-chain solutions. By leveraging Chainlink’s innovative technology, the government hopes to modernize its data dissemination processes and promote greater trust in public information.
source: https://blocknews.com/us-government-partners-with-chainlink-to-distribute-government-data-onchain/

data.title: JPMorgan Says Bitcoin (BTC) Undervalued Compared to Gold as Volatility Hits Record Lows
data.description:
JPMorgan Chase, a leading global financial institution, has stated that Bitcoin (BTC) is currently undervalued when compared to gold, particularly in light of the fact that the cryptocurrency has recently experienced a significant decrease in volatility, reaching record low levels. This assertion highlights the bank's perspective on the relationship between the digital asset and precious metals, suggesting that Bitcoin may represent a more attractive investment opportunity than it has in the past, especially considering the stability it has begun to exhibit.
source: https://blocknews.com/jpmorgan-says-bitcoin-btc-undervalued-compared-to-gold-as-volatility-hits-record-lows/

data.title: India keeps cotton duty off just as U.S. tariffs hit harder than ever
data.description:
India has extended its waiver on import duty for cotton by three months, pushing the deadline to Dec. 31, a government order showed on Thursday. The move is aimed at helping the country’s garment makers, who are under stress from steep U. S. tariffs. Global cotton prices turned higher after the decision, reversing earlier losses to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/india-cotton-import-waiver-extended/

data.title: Solana Trader Count Plummets 81% as “Meme Coin Craze” Turns Toxic
data.description:
The Solana ecosystem has seen trader participation collapse as the meme boom cools. Daily active DEX users dropped 81%, most new tokens vanish within hours, and celebrity-linked scams have cost wallets millions, even as Solana still leads Ethereum in trading volume.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/solana-trader-count-plummets-81-as-meme-coin-craze-turns-toxic/

data.title: Trump to Launch $40B WLFI Token September 1

The token, built on Ethereum, will be distributed through a system called Lockbox. Early backers who purchased tokens at $0. 015 and $0. 05 […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/trump-to-launch-his-40b-wlfi-cryptocurrency-on-september-1/

data.title: Everclear Launches TRON Network Support, Bringing Capital-Efficient Rebalancing to Top Stablecoin Network
data.description:
George Town, Cayman Islands – August 28, 2025 – Everclear, the cross-chain clearing and settlement protocol dedicated to eliminating liquidity fragmentation for blockchains and digital assets, announced an integration with the TRON network. This integration facilitates the settlement of onchain transactions without the need for centralized exchanges or fragmented routes, essentially solving liquidity fragmentation for […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/everclear-launches-tron-network-support-bringing-capital-efficient-rebalancing-to-top-stablecoin-network/

data.title: ETH/USDT, BTC/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the ETH/USDT, BTC/USDT, SOL/USDT, NMR/USDT, and XRP/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.51, funding rate: 0.0022%.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.80, funding rate: 0.0080%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.47, funding rate: 0.0100%.NMR/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 0.40, funding rate: -0.3350%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.07, funding rate: 0.0100%.

data.title: FIST token liquidity crisis: Whales are circling for a potential rug pull

data.title: Tether to Launch USDT Stablecoin on Bitcoin Blockchain, Here’s The Catch
data.description:
Tether has announced that it will launch its USDT stablecoin on the Bitcoin blockchain using the RGB protocol. It will be the first time USDT is available directly on Bitcoin. And that allows people to send stablecoin transactions on the network
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/28/tether-to-launch-usdt-stablecoin-on-bitcoin-blockchain-heres-the-catch/
